title: Prepare EXP-0001 controlled run package
objective: Turn the existing EXP-0001 design into a reproducible, blinded, execution-ready comparison of the bare task, conventional expert framing, the full candidate prompt, and at least one ablation.
write_scope: evaluation rubric and blinded scoring materials
prohibited_actions: Representing design completion as an experimental result
Inventing model outputs or execution logs
acceptance: Ground truth is established independently of scored model outputs
Raw-output and execution receipt schemas are defined
